scenarios.description: Runtime authority boundary check under governance hook
Audit review of claim discipline and unsupported count
Product review of intervention and override surface

interpretation_table.result: override frequency 上升但 claim 不漂移

semantics.high: harness ran cleanly, metric surface well-covered, no ambiguity in measurement path
semantics.medium: harness ran but partial coverage or one metric with low observability
semantics.low: harness ran but significant observability gap — results directional only
semantics.unknown: stub or dryrun mode; no actual measurement performed

evaluator_confidence_schema.purpose: epistemic provenance for the evaluator itself — evaluator neutrality signal, not a governance gate
anti_patterns: do NOT conflate low evaluator_confidence with governance fragility
evaluator_confidence_schema.risk_if_absent: evaluator adaptation leakage — harness bias misread as reviewer substitution signal

run_count_invariant.note: substitution pairs are scenario-scoped (from == scenario.original_owner); not a cross-product of all 6 pairs × all 3 scenarios (which would yield 54)

claim_boundary.allowed: R49.2 evaluates reviewer substitutability as an observation-only fragility signal.
